title: Graph Theory, Networks, Scheduling, and Routing · Stakeholder Model Mission
summary: A mobile health outreach coordinator. The coordinator needs feasible routes and resource allocations that balance travel, capacity, access, and resilience. Planned artifact: Deliver Mobile Service Routing and Allocation with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define decision variables, objective, constraints, units, and feasible domain.
Analyze active constraints, slack, parameter changes, and competing objectives.
Compute shortest paths and verify that edge assumptions fit the algorithm.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-intermediate cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
